observation.command: for f in /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/mini-performance/*.sysu.c /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/performance/*.sysu.c /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/llm-backend/*.sysu.c /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/llm-performance/*.sysu.c; do /workspace/YatCC/llvm/install/bin/clang -cc1 -dump-tokens "$f" 2>&1 | grep -oP "^[\w_]+"; done | sort -u
